name: Homemade Italian Sausage
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds well-marbled pork butt, medium ground
1/2 cup fresh Italian parsley, well packed
1 teaspoon hot red chili peppers, minces
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the pork butt to medium grind.
2. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl.
3. Using a sausage stuffer, fill casings, twisting off 8-inch links.
4. Tie and cut the sausages.
5. Hang in a cool place until dry, 12 to 14 hours.
6. To cook: Prick the skin well so they will not burst. Place them in a large skillet with about an inch of water. Cook on low heat for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Pour off the liquid and brown all sides until golden brown.
